title: AIR Plugins Index
description: Index of agent plugins available in this AIR configuration. Plugins extend agent capabilities beyond what MCP servers and skills provide. AIR plugins are agent-agnostic and translated to agent-specific formats at session start time.

propertyNames.description: Plugin identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Plugin.description: An agent plugin that extends capabilities via external commands.

id.description: Unique identifier for this plugin. Must match the key in the parent object.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the plugin.

description.description: Concise description of what this plugin does.

type.description: Plugin type. Currently only 'command' is supported.

command.description: Executable command to run for this plugin.

args.description: Command-line arguments for the plugin command.

env.description: Environment variables for the plugin process. Values support ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the plugin is killed.
